description_long: This is a mid-century modern style cabinet featuring a light wood finish and black angled legs. The front is divided into three sections: an open cubby on the left, two central drawers with round black knobs, and a single-door compartment on the right, also with a black knob. The top and sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and geometric form. The back and side panels are plain, with visible fastener points on the top surface. The cabinet is designed to be both functional and decorative, suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential spaces. Its construction suggests a combination of engineered wood and metal hardware, providing both durability and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A light wood cabinet with black legs, featuring an open cubby, two drawers, and a single-door compartment with black knobs. Its clean, modern design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cubby, two central drawers, and a right-side door, all with black knobs and black angled legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wood panel with no visible openings or features, and the black legs partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless wood panel with visible fastener points on the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a plain wood panel and black legs partially visible.
